entities.name: Strategy Evolution

entities.name: Enterprise Focus
entities.context: Strategic theme marked as Locked-In with high consensus (0.89) and low divergence

entities.name: Pricing 30% Increase
entities.context: Strategic theme marked as At-Risk with high conflict and weakening support (consensus 0.62)

entities.name: GTM Strategy
entities.context: Go-to-market strategy that Enterprise Focus amplifies

entities.name: Consensus
entities.context: Metric measuring alignment across strategy sessions (0-1 scale)

entities.name: Divergence
entities.context: Metric measuring conflict or contradiction in strategic thinking

entities.name: Trajectory
entities.context: Metric measuring directional momentum of strategic themes over time

entities.name: Cohesion
entities.context: Overall strategy alignment score (0.78 mentioned as strong)

entities.name: Strategic Evolution Report
entities.context: Prose summary output format for strategy analysis with executive summary and theme analysis sections

relationships.context: Consensus is a core metric in strategy evolution tracking
Divergence measures contradiction from baseline strategy
Trajectory tracks directional change over time
Enterprise Focus amplifies existing GTM strategy (High magnitude)
Report is the output format for strategy evolution analysis
Both are strategic themes being tracked in same analysis period
